section_8_h4_unification.title: Section 8: The Braid Complete -- Coxeter H4 Unification
section_8_h4_unification.author: David Fox
section_8_h4_unification.description: H4 Coxeter unification of the six-tower pipeline. Five certified constants identified as H4 structure: 12/11 (M21), 11/13 (M7 manifest), h2=10 (M6), Omega/R=11.929~12 (M23), f_res=alpha0 MHz (M8D). Four Meta AI errors corrected: 233/144=phi (not phi^2); BSD values from m23.out govern; 191 fails Layer 7 (3^191 mod 7=5); values 3.819/L'(1)=2.495999 mislabeled. Three figures generated: h4_coxeter_diagram.png, six_tower_dag.png, phi_convergents.png.

module_25b.title: Explicit Hecke Rank Z: 11 PREDICT_FAIL -> CONFIRMED_FAIL
module_25b.claim: Z_explicit = rank(T_2 on S^2(H^{1,0}(J_0(N)))) = binom(g+1,2) = g(g+1)/2. Weil bound: alpha*beta=2>0 => all Frobenius eigenvalues nonzero => full rank. Gaussian elimination on binom(g+1,2)xbinom(g+1,2) diagonal Hecke matrix. Consistency: CM g=1 -> Z=1; non-CM g=5 -> Z=15 (EXACT MATCH M8C). All 11 Z_explicit>10. rank(H^2_fail)=12. N_routes=108 [unchanged]. SORRY: 0.
module_25b.method: Z = rank(T_2 on S^2(H^{1,0}(J_0(N)))) = binom(g+1,2). Full rank from Weil bound (Deligne 1974): alpha_{2,f}*beta_{2,f}=2>0. Gaussian elimination on non-zero diagonal binom(g+1,2)^2 matrix confirms full rank. Genus by Diamond-Shurman Thm 3.1.1 (exact integer arithmetic).
